description: Baseline: Part B z-score + Part D cost-per-bene + opioid rate + Open Payments
V2: svc-per-bene z-score within specialty + LA opioid rate + PECOS gap x volume + speaking fees
V3: +HCPCS concentration HHI + upcoding ratio + taxonomy mismatch + PECOS type mismatch
V3: +HCPCS HHI + upcoding + taxonomy mismatch + PECOS mismatch
V4: Percentile-based extreme tail scoring (90/95/99th pct) + heavier svc_per_bene weight
V5: Focused 3 signals only (svc_per_bene 60% + LA_opioid 30% + PECOS 10%), sharper sigmoid
V6: V2 refined weights (svc_per_bene 0.35, LA_opioid 0.25, reduced weak signals)
V7: Ensemble 50% max(subscores) + 50% weighted_mean (catch ANY extreme dimension)

V15-FINAL: Pure max^1.2, clean fast implementation
